name.zh: 魔法小鹿 Codex 宠物

description.zh: 一只戴着魔法帽、拿着星星法杖的小鹿 Codex 宠物。当前仓库提供静态角色源图、宠物点击音和交互说明；完整动画宠物包可在后续通过 hatch-pet 流程生成。
description.en: A tiny deer Codex pet wearing a wizard hat and holding a star wand. This repository currently ships the static character reference, pet click sound, and integration notes; a full animated pet package can be generated later through the hatch-pet workflow.

notes.zh: 宠物声音应贴合小鹿、魔法、可爱、轻轻笑、关心主人这些状态，不使用普通按钮哔声。
notes.en: Pet sounds should match deer-like, magical, cute, soft-laughing, caring states rather than generic UI beeps.
